calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5) And Damages (Ccp 1095) And Complaint For Declaratory Relief And Damages (42 U.S.C. 1983)
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
David Paul Clisham, Esq., davidc1787@aol.com, 415-291-0855, for Petitioner.
Nancy Jean Tavernit, Esq.,415-554-3961 Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, for Defendant city and County of San Francisco.

A R G U E D.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER IAN FURMINGER'S petition for writ of administrative mandamus is denied.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Christine Jordan CSR# 12262, email: Cjordan@sftc.org, Reported. (302/EPS)

MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE / Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5) And Damages (Ccp 1095) And Complaint For Declaratory Relief And Damages (42 U.S.C. 1983)
Off Calendar Dec-15-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
David P. Clisham (415-291-0855; davidc1787@gmail.com) of Law Offices of Clisham & Sortor for Petitioner.
Nancy Tavernit (415-554-3961; Nancy.Tavernit@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Respondent.

DISCUSSED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript) RE: Mr. Clisham's request for continuance to review full tentative ruling sent by the court and having received respondent's proposed order verbatim with the court's tenative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER IAN FURMINGER's Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus (Ccp 1094.5) And Damages (Ccp 1095) And Complaint For Declaratory Relief And Damages (42 U.S.C. 1983) is continued to December 16, 2020 at 9:30am, Law and Motion. Parties have the court's tentative ruling sent on 12/14/2020.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
